name: Caneweave
description: Caned lattice of crossed diagonals, the canes re-tinting on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; width: 132%; height: 10%; -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(45deg); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(45deg); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 50%; top: 50%; width: 132%; height: 10%; -webkit-transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-45deg); transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(-45deg); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
